APIException - Exception Class in com.hotelreservation.auth.exception

ApiResponse - Class in com.hotelreservation.auth.dto
 
ApiResponse() - Constructor for class com.hotelreservation.auth.dto.ApiResponse
 
AuthController - Class in com.hotelreservation.auth.controller
REST controller for user authentication operations.
AuthController(AuthService) - Constructor for class com.hotelreservation.auth.controller.AuthController
Constructs the controller with the required authentication service.
authenticateUser(LoginRequestDTO) - Method in class com.hotelreservation.auth.controller.AuthController
Authenticates a user and returns a signed JWT token on success.
authenticateUser(LoginRequestDTO) - Method in class com.hotelreservation.auth.service.AuthService
Authenticates a user using Spring Security and returns a signed JWT token.
authenticationManager(AuthenticationConfiguration) - Method in class com.hotelreservation.auth.config.SecurityConfig
Exposes the AuthenticationManager as a Spring bean.
authenticationProvider() - Method in class com.hotelreservation.auth.config.SecurityConfig
Configures the DAO authentication provider that ties together the UserDetailsServiceImpl and the PasswordEncoder.
AuthService - Class in com.hotelreservation.auth.service
Service responsible for all user authentication and registration business logic.
AuthService(UserRepository, RoleRepository, PasswordEncoder, AuthenticationManager, JwtUtil) - Constructor for class com.hotelreservation.auth.service.AuthService
Constructs the service with all required authentication dependencies.
AuthServiceApplication - Class in com.hotelreservation.auth
 
AuthServiceApplication() - Constructor for class com.hotelreservation.auth.AuthServiceApplication

Generates a signed JWT token for a successfully authenticated user.

R

registerAdmin(SignupRequestDTO) - Method in class com.hotelreservation.auth.controller.AuthController
Registers a new admin user from the public admin registration form.
registerAdmin(SignupRequestDTO) - Method in class com.hotelreservation.auth.service.AuthService
Registers a new admin user from the public admin registration endpoint.
registerUser(SignupRequestDTO) - Method in class com.hotelreservation.auth.controller.AuthController
Registers a new user account with the default ROLE_USER role.
registerUser(SignupRequestDTO) - Method in class com.hotelreservation.auth.service.AuthService
Registers a new user account with the default ROLE_USER role.

JPA entity representing a registered user in the system.

Spring Security principal object wrapping an authenticated User entity.

Constructs a fully populated principal with all required identity fields.
